zh.lifeSummary: 當William Cheyney於1417年出生在英國英格蘭易亞斯特 素可瓦布萊頓時，他的父親Simon Cheyne29歲，母親Eleanor Nottingham23歲。他於1437年與Anne Sianley在英國英格蘭易亞斯特 素可瓦布萊頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1487年在他的家鄉享年70歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾惠特比聖 瑪麗 馮 維金 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Cheyney于1417年出生在英国英格兰易亞斯特 素可瓦布萊頓时，他的父亲Simon Cheyne29岁，母亲Eleanor Nottingham23岁。他于1437年与Anne Sianley在英国英格兰易亞斯特 素可瓦布萊頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1487年在他的家乡享年70岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾惠特比聖 瑪麗 馮 維金 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Cheyney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Chaney  .

variants.name: Chaney
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any one of several places in Normandy, Picardy, or Artois (France) named (Le) Quesnay or Quesnoy, or elsewhere in northern France named (Le or La) Chesnay or Chesnoy. The placenames all derive from Old French chesnai or its Normanno-Picard equivalent quesnai ‘oak grove’ (medieval Latin casnetum).
French: variant of Chanet, a habitational name from any of various places called Chanet or Le Chanet, from Latin canna ‘reed’ + the suffix -etum denoting an inhabitant.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Cheyney was born in 1417, in Warbleton, East Sussex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Simon Cheyne, was 29 and his mother, Eleanor Nottingham, was 23. He married Anne Sianley in 1437, in Warbleton, East Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1487, in his hometown, at the age of 70, and was buried in St Mary the Virgin Church, Whitby, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Cheyney est né en 1417, à Warbleton, East Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Simon Cheyne, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Nottingham, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Anne Sianley en 1437, à Warbleton, East Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1487, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à St Mary the Virgin Church, Whitby, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Cheyney 1417 in Warbleton, East Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Simon Cheyne 29 und seine Mutter Eleanor Nottingham 23. Er hat 1437 in Warbleton, East Sussex, England, United Kingdom Anne Sianley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1487 im Alter von 70 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in St Mary the Virgin Church, Whitby, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Cheyney è nato il nel 1417 nel Warbleton, East Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Simon Cheyne, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor Nottingham, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Anne Sianley nel 1437, nel Warbleton, East Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: William Cheyneyが1417年にイギリスイギリスエアスト スセックスワーブレトンで生まれた時，父Simon Cheyneは29歳，母Eleanor Nottinghamは23歳であった。1437年にイギリスイギリスエアスト スセックスワーブレトンでAnne Sianleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1487年に故郷で70歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアウィトビースト マリー ス バージン チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Mary The Virgin Church, Linton, Cambr: 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 린턴 스트 메리 테 버긴 c후르치
ko.St Mary the Virgin Church, Whitby, Yorks: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 휘트비 스트 메리 테 버긴 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: William Cheyney(이)가 1417년 영국 잉글랜드 이스트 수세스 워블레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Simon Cheyne(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Nottingham(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1437년 영국 잉글랜드 이스트 수세스 워블레턴에서 Anne Sianley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1487년 그의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 휘트비 스트 메리 테 버긴 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Cheyney nasceu em 1417, em Warbleton, East Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Simon Cheyne, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Nottingham, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Sianley em 1437, em Warbleton, East Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1487, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em St Mary the Virgin Church, Whitby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St Mary The Virgin Church, Linton, Cambr: ст мэри т виргин чурч, линтон, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.St Mary the Virgin Church, Whitby, Yorks: ст мэри т виргин чурч, уитби, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Cheyney родился в 1417 г. в местности варблетон, эаст суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Simon Cheyne было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Nottingham, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Sianley в 1437 г. в местности варблетон, эаст суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1487 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мэри т виргин чурч, уитби, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Cheyney nació en 1417, en Warbleton, East Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Simon Cheyne, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Eleanor Nottingham, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Anne Sianley en 1437, en Warbleton, East Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1487, en su pueblo, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en St Mary the Virgin Church, Whitby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
